title: Terralith structures suppressor
body:
Terralith is a beautiful way to enhance your minecraft world generation. However, it doesn't have any settings allowing to disable its structure generation. This can be a problem if you feel that those structures dont fit the vanilla style enough, if you want to play without structures or if you have others structures mods and you want to avoid interferences.
What this mod does is simply preventing Terralith's structures from generating.
